subsection.heading: Program.—
subsection.content: The National Park Foundation shall design and implement a comprehensive program to assist and promote philanthropic programs of support at the individual System unit level.

subsection.heading: Implementation.—
subsection.chapeau: The program under subsection (a) shall be implemented to—

paragraph.content: assist in the creation of local nonprofit support organizations; and
provide support, national consistency, and management-improving suggestions for local nonprofit support organizations.
shall include the greatest number of System units as is practicable; and

subparagraph.content: a standard adaptable organizational design format to establish and sustain responsible management of a local nonprofit support organization for support of a System unit;
standard and legally tenable bylaws and recommended money-handling procedures that can easily be adapted as applied to individual System units; and
a standard training curriculum to orient and expand the operating expertise of personnel employed by local nonprofit support organizations.

subsection.heading: Annual Report.—
subsection.content: The National Park Foundation shall report the progress of the program under subsection (a) in the annual report of the Foundation.

subparagraph.content: a nonprofit support organization or friends group to modify current practices or to affiliate with the National Park Foundation; or
a local nonprofit support organization, established as a result of this section, to be bound through its charter or corporate bylaws to be permanently affiliated with the National Park Foundation.

paragraph.heading: Establishment.—
paragraph.content: An affiliation with the National Park Foundation shall be established only at the discretion of the governing board of a nonprofit organization.

text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
